title: WRAPAROUND SERVICES - 211info
text: MADRAS MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES WRAPAROUND SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community-based mental health treatment services that include individual, family, and group therapy that focus on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma-related care, and wraparound services. 850 SW 4th Street Suite 302 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Ages 0-17 who are living with high level mental health needs Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 475-6575 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-6575 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Jefferson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - JEFFERSON COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - OPEN ACCESS CLINIC REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - JEFFERSON COUNTY COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES
